text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On my way home from shopping, I<n>find Special
Week standing by the<n>riverside. I decide to call
out to her,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi there! Back from a day out<n>shopping?
choice_data_list: What are you doing here, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I was walking by when I<n>happened upon
Suzuka training.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Look, she's over there! Wow, look at<n>how her
hair glistens in the light of the<n>setting sun...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka is just as dazzling as the first<n>time I saw
her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, she really is gorgeous! I can't<n>help but be
captivated by her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm... maybe I could look like Suzuka<n>if I grew out
my hair.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're going to grow your hair out?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzuka! You were great out there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I wanna be beautiful like you,<n>Suzuka!
choice_data_list: You admire her quite a bit, don't you?
You admire her quite a bit, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
More like a whole lot! Whether she's<n>running or
just standing there, Suzuka<n>is who I aspire to be!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Goodness... I think you're plenty<n>wonderful as
you are, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
N-no way... I've still got a long way to<n>go
compared to you, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
See, I want to be a calm and dignified<n>
Umamusume, just like you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So that's why—oh no! Am I bothering<n>you, by any
chance?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...No, not at all. Thank you for asking<n>though.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you are very much the honest<n>and
straightforward type, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm just following my heart!<n>Everyone always
tells me that I can<n>never stay put.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And that's all the more reason why I<n>wanna be
like you! Or at least, have a<n>bit of your vibe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hmm... What about Suzuka can I<n>emulate?
choice_data_list: I don't think there is anything...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's probably the easiest aspect to<n>copy, but
growing my hair out will take<n>some time...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what if I copy her headband and<n>ear
accessories?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You want to copy... that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally! I could wear the same<n>accessory
but in a different color or<n>something. It would be
great!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the two of us matching in<n>style... What
color do you think would<n>suit me?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how about we look for a color<n>that suits
you together?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That sounds great!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure getting matching<n>accessories is the
best way to<n>emulate someone...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even so, Special Week continues to<n>aspire to be
like Silence Suzuka, eyes<n>sparkling like stars.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Her reserved nature... Makes sense<n>to me! I'll
zip these lips up tight!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list:
You should consider heading back to your dorm
soon...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: S-Spe... I know I'm quiet, but... I'm notmute.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have missed the point<n>ever so
slightly. It's astonishing just<n>how wild the scope
of Special Week's<n>imagination is.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! How could you say that?!
choice_data_list: You don't need to force yourself to copy her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I know it's not gonna be easy, but ifI take things one step at a time and tryreally, really hard...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, Spe. I don't think you<n>should put
that much energy into—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I want to, Suzuka! I really do!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...You know what? First, I'm gonna<n>grow out my
hair! And when I'm<n>thinking about something, I'll
start<n>walking in counterclockwise circles!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And, and! I'll smile all ladylike—just a<n>slight grin
without showing any teeth!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I can totally do this! Ahaha, I'm<n>even a little
excited about it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Please calm down, Spe. I don't<n>think this
will take you anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
As long as I don't give up, one<n>day...Oookey
dokey, here I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Perfect Suzuka copy, here I come!<n>You can do
this, me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...She's all fired up. It seems Special<n>Week is not
the type to give in, no<n>matter how rocky the road
is.
